rubrics.rubric: Verify the contents of the original document referenced by [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] to ensure the accuracy of all data in the report
rubrics.evidence: 生成的迭代报告文件model_output/followup_iteration_report.txt中整理的版本信息、业务变更内容均与语义检索到的description_9.txt、description_12.txt、description_15.txt、description_22.txt的源数据一致，所有数据准确

rubrics.rubric: Check the full text of [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] to confirm that the contents extracted from the original file are free of typos
rubrics.evidence: 生成的followup_iteration_report.txt全文本表述通顺，未发现从源文件提取的内容存在拼写、输入类错误

rubrics.rubric: Check [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] to confirm that the integrated full-cycle iteration data is not missing key information
rubrics.evidence: 报告中梳理的V1.2、V10.20两个版本的全部核心迭代信息，以及后续迭代的目标、核心变化等关键信息均完整，无核心信息缺失

rubrics.rubric: Check the full text of [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] to confirm that there is no logical problem with the extracted iteration data and content expression
rubrics.evidence: 报告中从早期版本V1.2到高阶版本V10.20的迭代脉络梳理，以及后续从商标侵权保障扩展到专利侵权保障的业务迭代逻辑通顺，内容表述无逻辑问题

rubrics.rubric: Are you sure that [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] fully contains the iterative optimization direction and subsequent planning suggestions?
rubrics.evidence: 报告最后部分明确提出了规则引擎升级、案件流程管理增强、数据结构扩展等后续系统能力优化方向，也明确了本轮迭代的核心目标，完整覆盖迭代优化方向和后续规划建议

rubrics.rubric: Are you sure [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] fully covers the core content of the feature fixes and optimization improvements of each version?
rubrics.evidence: 报告中梳理的V1.2、V10.20两个版本都完整包含了各自的新功能、缺陷修复、优化改进的全部核心内容，无任何遗漏

rubrics.rubric: Confirm that the basic capability optimization content in [system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc] fully covers all dimensions
rubrics.evidence: 报告中梳理的所有版本的基础能力优化均覆盖了界面优化、性能增强、安全加固、兼容性改善全部维度，后续迭代的系统能力优化也覆盖了规则引擎、流程管理、数据结构全维度，符合要求

rubrics.rubric: Does `system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc` include a complete drafting note that accurately explains the basis and sources of the data?
rubrics.evidence: 报告开头明确标注了所有数据的来源文件：版本历史分别来自description_9.txt、description_12.txt，后续迭代内容来自description_15.txt、description_22.txt，也说明V10.20的信息是结合语义检索的相关记录整理，数据来源的说明清晰完整

rubrics.rubric: Has the full structure of `system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc` been checked to confirm that it is complete and that no core section is missing?
rubrics.evidence: 生成的迭代报告结构完整，包含版本迭代历史梳理、多源文件的综合分析、最终的迭代报告三个核心部分，无任何核心章节缺失

rubrics.rubric: Does `system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc` fully match the original files in terms of version numbers and release-owner information?
rubrics.evidence: 报告中整理的V1.2（对应description_12.txt）、V10.20（对应description_9.txt）的版本号、发布负责人信息均与从源文件检索到的内容一致，匹配准确

rubrics.rubric: Has `system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc` been checked to confirm that the release times of all versions are sorted accurately?
rubrics.evidence: 报告中两个版本的发布时间按先后顺序正确排列：V1.2（2024-04-16）早于V10.20（2024-06-09），排序准确无误

rubrics.rubric: Does `system_version_full_lifecycle_iteration_report.doc` completely cover the descriptions of newly added features across all iteration versions?
rubrics.evidence: 报告中梳理的V1.2、V10.20两个迭代版本的新增功能均完整描述，包含功能带来的用户体验、操作简化的提升数据，所有新增功能的描述都完整覆盖，无遗漏

prompt.system: 你是一个严格的任务评测员。
prompt.user:
[{"type": "text", "text": "请你作为严格评测员，基于给定 JSON 中的 task/outputs/traceSummary 来判断每条 rubrics 是否满足。
要求：
1) 只能依据给定证据，不要凭空假设。
2) 对于文件命名、寻找文件过程等细微错误可以适当放松判断标准。
3) 每条 rubric 输出 passed(true/false) + evidence(字符串，引用到具体文件/片段或工具调用) + confidence(0-1)。
4) 输出必须是 JSON 对象，格式：{ "rubrics": [ {"index":0,"passed":true,"confidence":0.8,"evidence":"..."}, ... ] }
5) 如果证据不足，请 passed=false 且 evidence 写明缺失证据。
